description: F&B brands celebrate Mother's Day by featuring limited-edition menu items with emotional messaging, heart-shaped treats, and special rotating menus positioned as gifts of appreciation for mothers.
structural_recipe: Create a carousel or carousel post showcasing Mother's Day-exclusive menu items. Lead with emotional copy mentioning 'Mom' and heart/maternal imagery (💕💐🖤). Feature limited-edition items (e.g., Pink Velvet Heart Cake) with visual prominence. Include specific dates (May 4–9 format) for campaign window. Use ALL CAPS section headers (🖤 WEEKLY ROTATING MENU 🖤) to organize offerings. Pair product descriptions with flavor details and NEW item callouts. Maintain warm, celebratory tone throughout.
why_it_works: Saudi culture places high value on family and maternal respect, making Mother's Day a peak emotional engagement moment. Limited-edition positioning creates urgency. Heart-shaped and pink aesthetic directly signals motherhood celebration. Specific dates drive timely purchase decisions. Rotating menu language suggests exclusivity and abundance of choice, appealing to F&B audience seeking novelty.
transplantation_caveats: Mother's Day timing varies by region—verify local date before deployment
Heart/pink aesthetics should not conflict with brand identity; test cultural reception in conservative segments
Ensure product descriptions are detailed enough to justify premium positioning implied by gifting narrative
